hooks.command: jq -r 'if (.tool_input.command | test("git push|gh pr create")) then "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"PostToolUse\",\"additionalContext\":\"POST-PUSH/PR: You just pushed or created a PR. Do an immediate check of the PR for CI failures (gh pr checks). Then start a background monitoring loop with /loop 2m: check every 2 minutes for 15 minutes for new CI failures. Fix straightforward issues and respond with a CLAUDE:-prefixed comment. For complex or ambiguous issues, consider asking the user for guidance instead.\"}}" else empty end'
